description_long: This kiosk features a modern, rectangular structure with a flat roof that includes two large skylight openings. The exterior is primarily white with bold purple accent panels, and the front facade displays a prominent 'TOULOUSE LAUTREC' sign along with a vertical slatted decorative element. The interior is visible through a wide open front, revealing a wood-patterned floor, a service counter, and a lounge area with seating and shelving. The side and rear walls are mostly solid, providing privacy and security, while the open front allows for customer interaction. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban environments such as plazas or sidewalks.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a flat roof, bold purple accents, and an open front for customer service. Features include skylights, wood-patterned flooring, and prominent signage.
description_view_0: The front view shows the open service area, wood-patterned floor, counter, seating, and the 'TOULOUSE LAUTREC' sign with vertical slats.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the solid purple accent wall with signage and a glimpse of the interior lounge area.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid white wall with minimal features and no visible entry points.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the two large skylight openings on the roof and the solid purple rear wall with signage.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and logo signage; placed on the front right corner and left side panel; visible text: 'TOULOUSE LAUTREC'.
attribute_window_presence: Two large rectangular skylight windows on the roof.
attribute_door_configuration: Single wide open entryway at the front.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with two large rectangular skylight openings; appears to be made of concrete or similar solid material.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with bold color accents and clean lines.
